item.title: Finding My Purpose In The Lord
item.description: Discover the pathway to finding your purpose in the Lord with this enlightening sermon. Explore how trust, delight, commitment, representation, and patience are not just virtues but steps ordered by God to guide us to our true calling. Learn from biblical wisdom, practical insights, and inspiring stories that reveal the beauty of living a purpose-driven life anchored in faith. Whether you're seeking direction, affirmation, or a deeper understanding of your spiritual journey, this message offers a clear, scriptural foundation to find your purpose in the embrace of the Lord's will. https://creekside.life

item.title: Inherited Tendencies of the Knowledge of Good and Evil
item.description: Explore the profound truths behind our inherited tendencies towards sin and the transformative hope found in Jesus Christ. This sermon delves into the biblical narrative, from the Fall in Genesis to the redemption offered through Christ's sacrifice, providing a deep understanding of sin's impact and the path to salvation. Discover how the knowledge of good and evil shapes us, the role of Jesus in our redemption, and the importance of personal responsibility and faith. Join us on a journey through Scripture to find hope and grace in the good news of Jesus Christ. https://creekside.life

item.title: Finding My Purpose in God's Manifestations
item.description: Delve into the significance of our daily actions and learn how even the smallest tasks can align with our divine calling. Discover the impact of historical figures like William Osler and Albert Einstein on understanding our purpose, all through a blend of humor, historical anecdotes, and Scripture. Whether you're seeking guidance on finding your purpose or looking to deepen your spiritual journey, this message offers invaluable insights into living a purpose-driven life. Join us as we uncover how to fully embrace and manifest God's purpose for us, making every moment count. https://creekside.life

item.title: Five Steps of Spiritual Growth for a Disciple or an Apprentice of Christ
item.description: Explore the transformative journey of becoming a disciple of Christ with our latest sermon, "Five Steps of Spiritual Growth for a Disciple or an Apprentice of Christ." Delve into the essential stages every believer embarks on, from being sanctified as a Saint to serving with humility, embracing lifelong learning as a Student, enduring as a Sufferer, and finally, empowering others as a Sender. Uncover how these steps guide us closer to embodying Christ's teachings in our daily lives, illustrating that discipleship is not just about knowledge or skills, but about becoming a reflection of Christ to the world. Join us to discover how you can embark on this spiritual journey, fostering a deeper, more meaningful connection with Christ and those around you. https://creekside.life

item.title: Finding My Purpose In God’s Purpose
item.description: Through the wisdom of Romans 8:28-29 and engaging anecdotes, discover the joy and fulfillment in embracing God's call, love, and predestination. Unveil the steps towards being conformed to the image of Christ and how this shapes our ultimate joy and purpose in life. Whether you're seeking direction, affirmation, or a deeper understanding of your spiritual journey, this message offers valuable insights into finding your unique place in God's grand narrative. https://creekside.life

item.title: The True Teachings of Christ in Practice
item.description: Discover how Christ's emphasis on practice over theory guides us towards making small, meaningful adjustments in our lives. Inspired by the real-life story of Play-Doh's invention, this sermon beautifully illustrates how we're all just one small adjustment away from aligning our lives more closely with Christ's teachings. From being misjudged to misguided, and misbehaving, learn how to see through Christ's eyes and become His apprentice in the way of love, kindness, and righteousness. Whether you're looking to deepen your faith or find practical ways to live out Christ's teachings every day, this sermon offers wisdom and insight for everyone. https://creekside.life

item.title: Finding My Purpose In God’s Thoughts
item.description: Dive into the heart of finding your purpose through God's lens with our latest sermon, "Finding My Purpose In God’s Thoughts." Unpack the profound truths hidden within Jeremiah 29:11-14, as we explore how God's plans, peace, and purpose shape our lives. Through engaging stories, biblical insights, and a touch of humor, this message invites you on a journey to deeper understanding and fulfillment. Discover how aligning with God's thoughts can transform your perspective on life's purpose. Join us for an enlightening exploration of finding true meaning and direction in the divine plans God has for each of us. https://creekside.life

item.title: Saul’s Path to Being Rejected and Replaced
item.description: Explore the riveting story of King Saul's rise and fall in "Saul’s Path to Being Rejected and Replaced". This sermon delves into the biblical narrative of 1 Samuel, offering profound insights into the dangers of disobedience, the deceitfulness of appearances, and the devastating consequences of losing God's presence. Through Saul's journey, learn the critical importance of spiritual integrity and the hope of redemption through obedience to God. Join us as we uncover the lessons Saul's story holds for personal growth and spiritual renewal. https://creekside.life

item.title: Keeping Worship Special
item.description: Explore the sacredness of worship in 'Keeping Worship Special,' a sermon that delves into the biblical significance of worship as a unique and holy experience. Through the metaphor of smell and a touching modern-day story, this message invites us to reflect on how we approach worship, encouraging us to create a special, sensory, and sacred space that honors God. Discover how ancient practices can guide our worship today, making it a pleasing aroma to the Lord. This sermon reminds us of the importance of respecting and cherishing our worship experiences, drawing closer to God with every breath. https://creekside.life

item.title: One Receives The Prize!
item.description: Explore the depths of your purpose with 'One Receives The Prize!' – a compelling journey through scripture that challenges us to live a life glorifying God. Discover the essential elements of realization, restraint, resolve, and rules through a diverse array of biblical passages. This sermon will guide you towards understanding your life's ultimate goal: to honor God in all you do. Whether you're seeking direction or inspiration to elevate your spiritual journey, this message offers valuable insights into achieving a purpose-driven life that aligns with God's glory. Join us as we delve into a transformative exploration of faith, purpose, and the pursuit of an imperishable crown. https://creekside.life

item.title: Coping With Our Fears 3
item.description: Welcome to the third part of our transformative sermon series, "Coping with Our Fears," where we explore the dynamic role of faith in addressing the anxieties that challenge us daily. In this segment, we delve into the power of scripture, drawing from Philippians 4:6-7 and other pivotal verses, to present humor-filled, relatable narratives alongside deep spiritual insights. Learn about the four pillars of coping with anxiety through faith: prayer, peace, protection, and the power of God. We dissect common fears with practical examples—ranging from humorous hypotheticals to everyday worries—showcasing how these concerns often hold less substance than we might think. This sermon offers an in-depth look at the unnecessary nature of most anxieties and provides biblical strategies for shifting our focus from fear to faith. Highlighting the significance of prayer, the peace that comes from trusting God, the protection offered by faith, and the strength found in Christ, we're guided on how to transform our approach to life's uncertainties. https://creekside.life

item.title: Excessive Church of Christ Fears
item.description: Dive into an enlightening journey as we explore "Excessive Church of Christ Fears" in our latest sermon. Discover how common fears among believers, from financial loss to the dread of judgment day, can be overcome through faith, scriptural wisdom, and the transformative power of God's love. With engaging anecdotes, historical insights, and a deep dive into the Scriptures, this sermon offers a comforting perspective on facing our fears with courage and trust in the Lord. Join us for a faith-affirming session that promises to uplift and inspire. https://creekside.life

item.title: Coping With Our Fears 2
item.description: Discover how scriptures like Isaiah 41:10 and 2 Timothy 1:7 guide us towards a sound mind, love, and power over fear. From personal anecdotes to divine truths, learn how faith in God's presence, godliness, helpfulness, and righteousness can transform fear into faithfulness. Whether it's fear of the unknown or everyday anxieties, this sermon offers insights for anyone looking to find peace and courage through their faith. https://creekside.life

item.title: Double Trouble
item.description: Explore the powerful theme of 'Double Trouble' in this enlightening sermon, as we delve into biblical stories of curses and blessings to uncover the dangers of duplicity in faith. Discover how ancient narratives and modern-day distractions reveal the importance of a single-minded devotion to God. Learn practical steps to avoid the pitfalls of being double-hearted, double-minded, and double-tongued, and how to embrace a life of focused faithfulness. Join us on a journey from the perils of divided loyalty to the peace of unwavering commitment to what is right and true. https://creekside.life

item.title: Coping With Our Fears
item.description: Explore the depths of faith and fear with our enlightening sermon "Coping With Our Fears." Delve into how understanding God's promises, presence, and purposes provides us with the strength to face our darkest fears. From personal stories across the globe to the wisdom of Psalms and the insightful experiments of Curt Paul Richter, this sermon offers hope and guidance for navigating the valleys of life. Discover how to anchor your soul in hope and emerge fearless, no matter the challenges. Join us on this transformative journey to overcoming fear with faith. https://creekside.life

item.title: How to Incline My Heart to Obey God Forever
item.description: Discover the transformative journey of inclining your heart to obey God forever in our latest sermon. Drawing inspiration from Psalm 119:112-116, we explore the profound shift from performing religious duties to embodying a spirit of true obedience and devotion. Learn how to cultivate a deep-seated aversion to spiritual instability, find solace and protection in the Lord, and place unwavering hope in His Word. Join us as we navigate through the three key inclinations that can transform your relationship with God: hating all forms of instability, hiding in the Lord during times of trouble, and hoping in God's Word as the ultimate source of truth and salvation. This sermon is not just about what we do but about who we are inclined to be in the Spirit. Subscribe for more uplifting messages and join us in exploring the depths of faith, hope, and love in our spiritual walk with God. https://creekside.life

item.title: What We Must Remember Part 3: We Must Remember Purity
item.description: Explore the essence of spiritual purity in 'What We Must Remember Part 3: Remember Purity'. Delve into a thought-provoking journey through Revelation 3:1-6 and other key Scriptures, discovering how to maintain purity in a challenging world. Laugh, reflect, and grow with an unforgettable illustration about three boys and their dads. Join us in understanding how purity isn't just about the flesh but encompasses our whole being, as we seek to live worthy lives before God. https://creekside.life

Join us in understanding how purity isn't just about the flesh but encompasses our whole being, as we seek to live worthy lives before God. https://creekside.life

item.title: Why We Can Not Help Everyone
item.description: Dive into the depths of human constraints in 'Why We Can Not Help Everyone - Part 2'. This thought-provoking sermon ventures beyond conventional understanding, focusing on the limitations not just within us, but also in those we strive to assist. Harnessing a blend of biblical narratives, modern analogies, and a touch of humor, this message sheds light on the intricate challenges of aiding others while embracing our own limitations. Engage in this enlightening exploration that intertwines spiritual insights with everyday realities, fostering a deeper comprehension of our roles in others' lives according to the principles of Luke 22 and other scriptures. Witness a unique perspective on service, patience, and understanding in our spiritual walk. https://creekside.life

item.title: Christmas Dreams of Guidance
item.description: Explore the divine guidance God provides in our lives through this insightful sermon, 'Christmas Dreams of Guidance'. Drawing from the story of Joseph's dreams, this sermon illuminates the protective, prescriptive, proscriptive, and predictive guidance God offers. Discover how God's guidance in the past can shape our present and future. Perfect for those seeking comfort and direction in their faith journey. https://creekside.life

item.title: When The World Said Christians Were Bad
item.description: Explore the trials and tribulations faced by Christians throughout history and in the modern world in this enlightening sermon. Drawing on scripture and historical references, we delve into the accusations and misconceptions that have been leveled against Christians, from the early days of the faith to the present. Discover how Christianity has thrived despite opposition and consider how you can stand firm in your faith amidst worldly challenges. Join us for this thought-provoking journey through history and faith. https://creekside.life

item.title: "But If Not..." Hallelujah Anyway
item.description: Explore the power of unwavering faith in this enlightening sermon, 'But If Not... Hallelujah Anyway'. Drawing from the story of Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego, this message encourages us to stand firm in our faith, even in the face of adversity. Discover how our God, who is alive and active, can be our shield and reward in times of trial. https://creekside.life

item.description: Explore the life and legacy of the Apostle Paul in this enlightening sermon. Journey through Paul's conversion, his missionary campaigns, and his influential correspondence, all backed by scripture and historical context. Discover how Paul's dedication to spreading the Gospel serves as a testament to the transformative power of faith in Jesus Christ. https://creekside.life

item.title: How Nobody’s Influence Changed History
item.description: Discover the profound influence of 'nobodies' in the Bible in this enlightening sermon. Journey through the stories of an unknown butler, daughter, and widow, and see how their actions changed history. This sermon will inspire you to see the value in every individual and the potential impact of every action. Join us as we delve into these fascinating biblical narratives and uncover the power of the 'nobody'. https://creekside.life

item.title: What Have You Hidden From TheRest of Us?

Explore biblical teachings on hiding and revealing our lives, our deeds, and our failures. Uncover the truth about why we hide and how confession can lead to greater success and spiritual growth. Join us for a journey through scriptures from Psalms, Matthew, Romans, and more https://creekside.life

item.title: Meals with Jesus
item.description: Discover the profound significance of meals in the Bible in our latest sermon, "Meals with Jesus". Journey through ten biblical stories of meals involving Jesus, and uncover their implications for Christian fellowship, communion, and our relationship with God. From the multiplication of wine at a wedding to the final celebratory meal in Revelation, each meal carries a miraculous message or miracle. Join us as we delve into these stories and explore how they speak to different places within us. https://creekside.life

item.title: It’s Hard to Get from Here to There
item.description: Join us as we explore the trials and triumphs of faith in our sermon, "It's Hard to Get from Here to There." Drawing from personal experiences and the lives of biblical figures, we delve into the hardships we face and the blessings we receive as we journey in faith. Discover how faith can guide us through life's challenges and lead us to blessings beyond our imagination. This sermon is a testament to the enduring power of faith, and a reminder that with God, all things are possible. https://creekside.life

item.title: The Development of The Apostle Peter
item.description: Step into the life of the Apostle Peter, a man who transitioned from a humble fisherman to a stalwart of faith. This sermon invites you to experience Peter's trials, triumphs, and his spiritual maturation. It's more than a biblical narrative; it's a reflection of our own spiritual progression. Are you prepared to mature in your faith? https://creekside.life

item.title: If a man dies, shall he live again?
item.description: Embark on a spiritual journey as we grapple with the profound question, "If a man dies, shall he live again?", the fifth in the series of "Questions that Deserve an Answer". This sermon takes you on a deep dive into the Book of Job to the New Testament. We'll explore the intricate tapestry of life, death, and what comes after, guided by the divine wisdom of God's creation, conclusion, and considerations. This sermon is an essential watch for those seeking solace, comprehension, and hope amidst the inevitability of mortality. https://creekside.life

item.title: My God, My God, Why?
item.description: Explore the reasons behind Jesus' suffering and how it relates to our own trials and tribulations in the fourth installment in the series of "Questions That Deserve an Answer". Uncover the biblical truths behind the Proclamation, the Prophetic, the Pardon, and the Punishment. This sermon will guide you through a journey of understanding, empathy, and spiritual growth. https://creekside.life

item.title: How to be Foolish
item.description: Hear about the wisdom of humility and the folly of pride. Through the books of James, Proverbs, and other scriptures, we will explore the pitfalls of self-elevation and the importance of seeking wisdom from God and others. Discover how to avoid foolishness by learning from past mistakes, listening more, and making peace. https://creekside.life

item.title: Questions That Deserve an Answer #2
item.description: Dive into the second sermon in the series of questions that deserve an answer. In this lesson we will discover the five reasons why we should answer 'Yes' to being our brother's keeper, and how this responsibility extends to various aspects of our lives. This sermon is a must-watch for anyone seeking to deepen their understanding of Christian responsibility and brotherhood. https://creekside.life

item.title: Preparation for Organizational Division
item.description: Dive into part three of this series, "Thinking Inside The Box" where we explore the biblical teachings on handling church divisions. This sermon is a must-watch for anyone seeking guidance on maintaining unity and peace within their church community. It's packed with wisdom from Acts 20:17-38, providing practical steps to prevent division and promote harmony. Discover how to remain unmoved by plots, panic, pain, perusals, phonies, philosophies, and prosperity. Join us as we learn to stand firm in our faith and commitment to the church, just as Jesus did. https://creekside.life

item.title: Questions That Deserve an Answer #1
item.description: Join us as we explore three pivotal "Questions That Deserve an Answer #1". Discover the profound answers given by the apostles and how they apply to our lives today. This sermon is a must-watch for anyone seeking to deepen their understanding of repentance, baptism, and the personal nature of salvation. https://creekside.life

item.title: Thinking Inside the Box #2
item.description: Dive into part two of this series, "Preparation for Theological Friction," where we explore the challenges of church division and the importance of unity. Discover the three principles leaders should follow when friction arises, focusing on the precedence of experience, exegesis, and expediency. This sermon is a must-watch for anyone seeking to understand the complexities of maintaining unity within the church and preparing for theological friction. https://creekside.life

item.title: Jesus Is Worthy to Receive Tithes
item.description: Explore the historical and theological perspectives of tithing from the Patriarchal Age to the Christian Age, and discover why Jesus, being of the Order of Melchizedek, is worthy to receive tithes. This sermon is a treasure trove of biblical references, historical facts, and thought-provoking insights that will enrich your understanding of giving in the Christian faith. https://creekside.life

item.title: Thinking Inside the Box #1
item.description: Join us as we explore the importance of 'inside the box' thinking for church leaders, drawing from the wisdom of Jesus, Peter, James, and John. Discover how exposure to manifestations, miracles, and miseries can shape us into strong leaders. This sermon is a must-watch for Elders, Deacons, Preachers, Teachers, and potential leaders. https://creekside.life

item.title: Jesus Taught the Kingdom Is Worth It All
item.description: Explore the difference between debt and investment, both in our worldly lives and in our spiritual journey. Drawing from personal anecdotes and humor, we delve into the true value of the Kingdom of God and why it's worth investing everything we have. We also examine various biblical passages to understand the pitfalls of giving with the wrong intentions. This sermon is a call to reflect on our spiritual investments and to prioritize the Kingdom of God above all else. Tune in and let's grow in faith together. Don't forget to like, share, and subscribe for more inspiring messages. https://creekside.life

item.title: Paths to Overcoming Crazy
item.description: Explore mental health in a new light. In this sermon, we'll uncover paths from the story of Nehemiah. We'll learn how to strengthen our minds and spirits through Acknowledgment, Attempting, Altering, and Avoidance. This is a journey of faith, resilience, and self-discovery that will inspire and empower you. Come, let's grow together. https://creekside.life

item.title: Do Schools of Thought Kill the Creative?
item.description: Dive into this enlightening sermon exploring the impact of schools of thought on creativity, drawing parallels from the Bible and modern society. Discover how Jesus Christ, the ultimate creative, navigated through the rigid structures of His time. This sermon will challenge your perspective, inspire your faith, and ignite your creative spirit. https://creekside.life

item.title: Where They Found Young Jesus
item.description: Explore the life of young Jesus with us. This sermon delves into the scriptures of Luke 2:39-52, revealing where Jesus was found and how he grew in wisdom and stature. Discover the importance of the House of God, the role of teachers, and the power of studying scripture. This sermon is a must-watch for anyone seeking to deepen their understanding of Jesus' early life and the lessons we can learn from it. https://creekside.life
